Configuration for JavaScript unit tests with Mocha and ESLint dependencies and scripts.

# Purpose
The JSON file is a `package.json` file used in a JavaScript project to manage project metadata and dependencies. It specifies the project name as `js_tooling-unittests` and version `1.0.0`. The `main` field indicates the entry point of the project as `test_js_tooling.js`. The `devDependencies` section lists the development dependencies required for the project, including `eslint`, `eslint-plugin-import`, `eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y`, `mocha`, and `unroll`, each with their respective version constraints. The `scripts` section defines command line scripts for testing and linting the code, using `mocha` for running tests and `eslint` for code linting. The file also includes an author field and specifies the license as "© Pebble Technology Corp."
